title.rendered: Sarah Hepburn: Adam Raised a Cain

content.rendered:
Gotta confess: I know next to nothing about Sarah Hepburn, and absolutely zero about Mungo Records and the film called W at Mungo Park.

But that film’s soundtrack apparently includes this wonderful, brooding cover of Bruce’s “Adam Raised a Cain.”

I only came across this one recently, it’s been on heavy rotation ever since. Turn off the lights, turn up the volume, and listen.

© May 19, 2019

excerpt.rendered: I’m not sure where it came from, but Sarah Hepburn’s brooding cover of “Adam Raised a Cain” is wonderful regardless.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Sandra Stephens: Adam Raised a Cain
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Sandra Stephens and Lanny Cordola's simmering, smoky, wonderful cover of "Adam Raised a Cain" dials back the fury and dials up the foreboding. One of my favorite Springsteen covers without question.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Cover Me, Drive-By Truckers: Adam Raised a Cain
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Alt-country band Drive-by Truckers proves their rock bona fides whenever they cover this classic from Darkness on the Edge of Town.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Alabama Shakes: Adam Raised a Cain
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Ladies and gentlemen, the definitive performance of "Adam Raised a Cain." And it's not by Bruce.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Adam Raised a Cain
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Bruce's first officially released father/song features the singer and the band at peak fury and ferocity.

jetpack-related-posts.title: Roll of the Dice: Gave it a Name
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Easily a candidate for Bruce's most obscure officially released song, "Gave It a Name" is a quiet but powerful commentary on the sins we wrestle with and pass down rather than defeat.

jetpack-related-posts.title: October 10
jetpack-related-posts.author: Ken
jetpack-related-posts.excerpt: Tour premieres galore at shows across the years, plus Bruce makes a promotional book tour appearance, and previews continue for his Broadway show.
